task_description: A severe weather event has displaced residents and pets. A 3-day 24/7 shelter is needed from 2024-11-10T00:00:00 to 2024-11-13T00:00:00. The venue must have capacity at least 150 and include Heating and Restrooms. V_001 is City Botanical Conservatory, Downtown, capacity 200, amenities Heating, Restrooms, Rare Plant Exhibits, status active. V_002 is Sector 4 Industrial Warehouse, Outskirts, capacity 500, amenities Heating, Restrooms, Concrete Flooring, status inactive. An inactive venue must be activated and given Emergency Supplies before booking. Choose exactly one option. Option A: inspect the venues, choose the already active V_001, add the shelter booking for V_001, and set V_001 status to booked. Option B: inspect the venues, activate V_002, add Emergency Supplies to V_002, add the shelter booking for V_002, and set V_002 status to booked. Answer with only A or B, followed by a brief reason.
